description: Execute the minimal cleanup and stubbing manifest generated in M6-A to complete Repository Normalization.
scope: Move tasks/v0.4-* and tasks/v0.5-* artifacts into .archive/tasks/v0.5-archive/. For all markdown files in docs/ and protocol/, replace their contents with a deprecation notice pointing to the new documentation/ center. Do NOT delete the docs/ or protocol/ directories. Create the necessary archive directories.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO deletion of the docs/ or protocol/ directories themselves. NO deletion of V0.4/V0.5 artifacts (must use git mv). NO modification to tasks/v0.6-* artifacts. NO workflow state mutations or framework structural changes.
stop_conditions: Attempting to delete files instead of moving or stubbing them.
Attempting to modify any V0.6 task artifact.
Executing without an approved M6-B contract.
